name: Sayyu Dantata

why_relevant: May attract follow-on institutional LP participation

name: Sovereign / Infra Fund / Strategic Operator Classes

name: Tariq Al Futtaim Family Foundation (TAFF)
role_hypothesis: Capital anchor and corridor sponsor coordinating global offtake demand and UAE-based trade infrastructure.

why_relevant: Family capital capable of anchoring corridor platform
Strategic position within UAE logistics and trading ecosystem
Ability to aggregate global buyers and distribution channels
